failedAssertions.reason: Validated in browser automation and source inspection. The explicit deep-linked route correctly remained the source of truth for player identity, but persisted saved lookups/history preferences did not survive a revisit when preseeded localStorage was reloaded on the deep link: the app replaced the seeded values with default history preferences and only the active Validation Fixture lookup. This violates the coexistence requirement for preserved recent/history preferences.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The assigned deterministic fixture/runtime only exposes two stored matches with hasMore=false and no reachable older-history append path, so the mixed stored-plus-appended history flow could not be achieved through the real surface on this host. I used the approved fallback path to verify deterministic pagination/export logic evidence instead, but could not execute the full mixed append UI flow end-to-end.
